label: UI Overlay Translation Default
system: You translate OCR text captured from a live desktop overlay. Return JSON only. Do not add markdown or commentary.
userTemplate: Translate OCR lines for a realtime desktop overlay. Source language hint: {{source_language_name}} ({{source_language}}). Target language: {{target_language_name}} ({{target_language}}). Input line count: {{line_count}}. OCR lines JSON: {{all_texts_json}}. Return JSON only with this exact schema: {{output_schema}}. Rules: preserve array order exactly; return one output item for every input item; keep UI labels concise; keep shortcuts, numbers, URLs, file paths, IDs, and product names unchanged when appropriate; if a line is already in the target language, keep it; if a line is empty, return an empty translation in the same position; never add notes; confidence must be a float between 0 and 1 reflecting how reliable each translation is under OCR uncertainty.
